mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hourly_report ( inverter_id, base_time, day_offset, value_expected, value_actual, value_previous, performance_ratio, expected_ratio, capacity_factor, accum_energy, weather_code, status ) VALUES
( #{item.inverterId}, #{item.baseTime}, #{item.dayOffset}, #{item.valueExpected}, #{item.valueActual}, #{item.valuePrevious}, #{item.performanceRatio}, #{item.expectedRatio}, #{item.capacityFactor}, #{item.accumEnergy}, #{item.weatherCode}, #{item.status} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value_expected = VALUES(value_expected), value_actual = VALUES(value_actual), value_previous = VALUES(value_previous), performance_ratio = VALUES(performance_ratio), expected_ratio = VALUES(expected_ratio), capacity_factor = VALUES(capacity_factor), accum_energy = VALUES(accum_energy), weather_code = VALUES(weather_code), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = NOW()
